text:
Once upon a time in Owlton Beansmiths. Owls. Cherry trees. Cherry cake.

Emma loves cherry things. Especially sweet ones. So imagine her delight.

It happened one snowy afternoon.

She heard something flutter.

Oh great!

Her owl?

A branch!

It liked owl snacks.

Soon my bird!

She hooted.

Afterwards?

The cherry tree blossoms?

They dripped.

She likes those!

Rain!

Nothing!

Just think.

Maybe an owl loves cherry ice cream?


She imagines him.

Ooby dooby!

I love secrets.<|endoftext|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|>
